g.text: I added the 100 nF capacitor between 3.3V and GND for decoupling.

g.desc: I added the 100 nF capacitor between 3.3V and GND for decoupling.

g.text: It helps stabilize the power supply voltage and reduce electrical noise around the microcontroller.

g.desc: It helps stabilize the power supply voltage and reduce electrical noise around the microcontroller.

g.text: Even though the Nucleo board already has capacitors built in, I included it in the schematic.

g.desc: Even though the Nucleo board already has capacitors built in, I included it in the schematic.

g.text: I added the PWR_FLAG symbols to indicate that the 3.3V and GND lines are

g.desc: I added the PWR_FLAG symbols to indicate that the 3.3V and GND lines are

g.text: powered externally by the Nucleo board.

g.desc: powered externally by the Nucleo board.

g.text: This helps KiCad pass the ERC checks and removes warnings about unpowered

g.desc: This helps KiCad pass the ERC checks and removes warnings about unpowered

g.text: I added the "X" no-connect symbols on unused pins to indicate that those pins were intentionally left unconnected.

g.desc: I added the "X" no-connect symbols on unused pins to indicate that those pins were intentionally left unconnected.

g.text: This helps keep the schematic clear and removes ERC warnings in KiCad about floating or unconnected pins.

g.desc: This helps keep the schematic clear and removes ERC warnings in KiCad about floating or unconnected pins.
